tests.scenario: Free user can browse and play free meditation sessions
steps: Open the Headspace application without an active subscription
Navigate to the meditation library
Locate a session marked as free
Press play on the free session
tests.expected_result: The free meditation session begins playback without requiring a subscription.
tests.notes: Revised expected result to confirm playback rather than just display.

tests.scenario: At least 5 free sessions are visible in the library
steps: Open the Headspace application without an active subscription
Navigate to the meditation library
Count the number of sessions accessible without a subscription
tests.expected_result: At least 5 meditation sessions are accessible to the user without a premium subscription.
tests.notes: New test added to verify the minimum count requirement introduced in FR_hybrid_1.

tests.scenario: Application loads home screen within 5 seconds on launch
steps: Ensure the device has an active internet connection
Launch the Headspace application
Start a timer at launch and stop it when the home screen appears
tests.expected_result: The home screen loads and content is visible within 5 seconds of launch.
tests.notes: Added timer step to make the test measurable, matching the 5-second threshold in FR_hybrid_2.

tests.scenario: Application reconnects after a temporary network interruption
steps: Open the Headspace application
Disable the device internet connection briefly
Re-enable the internet connection
Observe whether the application recovers
tests.expected_result: The application reconnects to the server and content becomes accessible without requiring a manual restart.
tests.notes: Retained from original hybrid test. Added final step for clarity.

tests.scenario: Meditation session plays without crashing
steps: Open the Headspace application
Select any available meditation session
Press the play button
Allow the session to play for at least 2 minutes
tests.expected_result: The application remains stable and does not crash during the 2-minute playback.
tests.notes: Extended duration from original test to better stress-test stability.

tests.scenario: Consecutive session launches do not cause crashes
steps: Open the Headspace application
Play a meditation session and exit it
Immediately select and play a second session
Exit and repeat once more with a third session
tests.expected_result: All three sessions launch and play without the application crashing or becoming unresponsive.
tests.notes: New test to cover repeated session launch scenario reported in H1 reviews.

tests.scenario: Meditation session reachable within three taps from home screen
steps: Open the Headspace application to the home screen
Navigate toward a specific meditation session
Count the number of taps required to reach the session
tests.expected_result: The user reaches the meditation session within three taps from the home screen.
tests.notes: Rewritten from original T_hybrid_3a which tested navigation broadly. Now directly validates the three-tap constraint in FR_hybrid_4.

tests.scenario: Navigation remains functional after an app update
steps: Note the location of key sections before an update
Install the latest version of the Headspace application
Navigate to the same sections after the update
Count interactions needed to reach a meditation session
tests.expected_result: Key sections remain accessible within three taps and no previously known feature is missing without explanation.
tests.notes: Merged from manual T_manual_8a. Post-update navigation consistency is a key concern in H4 reviews.

tests.scenario: Sleep section is reachable from the main navigation
steps: Open the Headspace application
Open the main navigation menu
Locate and tap the sleep or relaxation section
tests.expected_result: The sleep section opens and displays a list of available sleep stories and relaxation sessions.
tests.notes: Retained from original hybrid test with clearer step descriptions.

tests.scenario: Search returns sleep content results
steps: Open the Headspace application
Use the search function and enter the term 'sleep'
Review the results displayed
tests.expected_result: At least one sleep story or relaxation session appears in the search results.
tests.notes: New test added to verify discoverability via search, complementing the navigation test.

tests.scenario: Audio continues uninterrupted after screen lock
steps: Open the Headspace application
Start a sleep story or meditation audio session
Lock the device screen while audio is playing
Wait 2 minutes and unlock the screen
tests.expected_result: Audio playback continues without interruption during and after the screen lock.
tests.notes: New test covering the screen-lock scenario added in FR_hybrid_6.

tests.scenario: Audio plays continuously for an extended session
steps: Open the Headspace application
Start a sleep story
Allow playback without any interaction for at least 10 minutes
tests.expected_result: Audio plays continuously for the full 10 minutes without pausing or stopping unexpectedly.
tests.notes: New test to validate sustained playback stability during typical sleep-use sessions.

tests.scenario: Subscription pricing shown before payment prompt
steps: Open the Headspace application without an active subscription
Select a premium meditation session
Observe what is displayed before any payment option
tests.expected_result: Subscription plan prices are displayed before the user is presented with a payment or sign-up prompt.
tests.notes: New test validating the pricing transparency requirement in FR_hybrid_7.

tests.scenario: All subscription tiers are listed on the pricing screen
steps: Open the Headspace application without a subscription
Navigate to the subscription or upgrade screen
Review the plan options displayed
tests.expected_result: All available subscription plans and their prices are listed and visually distinguishable.
tests.notes: Merged from manual T_manual_3b. Ensures users can compare plan options before committing.

tests.scenario: User cancels subscription through account settings
steps: Open the Headspace application with an active subscription
Navigate to account settings
Select subscription management
Choose to cancel the subscription
tests.expected_result: The cancellation completes successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.
tests.notes: Retained from manual T_manual_9a. Added confirmation message to expected result per FR_hybrid_8.

tests.scenario: Renewal date and amount shown before cancellation
steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate to account settings and open subscription management
Review the subscription details screen before cancelling
tests.expected_result: The next renewal date and billing amount are displayed on the subscription details screen.
tests.notes: Retained from manual T_manual_9b. Validates billing transparency before cancellation.

tests.scenario: Renewal notification sent 3 days before billing date
steps: Set up an active auto-renewing subscription
Wait until 3 days before the renewal date
Check for a push notification or email from Headspace
tests.expected_result: The user receives a notification at least 3 days before renewal showing the charge amount and renewal date.
tests.notes: New test for the renewal notification requirement added in FR_hybrid_9, not present in auto pipeline.

tests.scenario: Notification includes correct renewal amount and date
steps: Receive the renewal notification
Open the notification and verify its contents
Cross-reference the amount with the subscription details screen
tests.expected_result: The notification shows the correct renewal date and billing amount matching the subscription plan.
tests.notes: New test to validate the accuracy of renewal notification content.

tests.scenario: Support contact option visible in help section
steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate to the help or support section
Look for a contact support option
tests.expected_result: At least one contact method such as a web form, email, or chat link is visible in the support section.
tests.notes: Retained from manual T_manual_10a with updated requirement ID.

tests.scenario: Support option accessible from subscription settings
steps: Open the Headspace application
Navigate to account or subscription settings
Look for a link or button to contact support
tests.expected_result: A support contact option is available directly from the subscription or billing settings screen.
tests.notes: Retained from manual T_manual_10b. Validates support is reachable from the context where billing issues arise.
